topic: 严格白名单二次重跑：只允许 microsoft/AIOpsLab 与 mozilla-ai/any-agent，丢弃并不得访问其他仓库。使用 GitHub API contents/tree 完整枚举 .github/workflows，明确输出每个仓库 workflows_dir_status=missing|empty|present|error。对 present 的每个 workflow 读取正文并结构化抽取 path、text_hash、triggers、permissions、jobs、runner、container、services、dependency_pinning、cache、test_commands、eval_commands、metrics、artifact_paths、failure_thresholds、required_secrets_names_only。读取 pyproject.toml、AGENTS.md、CLAUDE.md、CONTRIBUTING.md，输出 exists/missing、text_hash、可验证的自主编码约束、可迁移 CI/eval gate、不可迁移原因。严格分离 verified_facts 与 unverified_assumptions；禁止输出 secret 值、token 或含凭据 artifact。

queue.topic: 严格白名单二次重跑：只允许 microsoft/AIOpsLab 与 mozilla-ai/any-agent，丢弃并不得访问其他仓库。使用 GitHub API contents/tree 完整枚举 .github/workflows，明确输出每个仓库 workflows_dir_status=missing|empty|present|error。对 present 的每个 workflow 读取正文并结构化抽取 path、text_hash、triggers、permissions、jobs、runner、container、services、dependency_pinning、cache、test_commands、eval_commands、metrics、artifact_paths、failure_thresholds、required_secrets_names_only。读取 pyproject.toml、AGENTS.md、CLAUDE.md、CONTRIBUTING.md，输出 exists/missing、text_hash、可验证的自主编码约束、可迁移 CI/eval gate、不可迁移原因。严格分离 verified_facts 与 unverified_assumptions；禁止输出 secret 值、token 或含凭据 artifact。

evomap.topic: 严格白名单二次重跑：只允许 microsoft/AIOpsLab 与 mozilla-ai/any-agent，丢弃并不得访问其他仓库。使用 GitHub API contents/tree 完整枚举 .github/workflows，明确输出每个仓库 workflows_dir_status=missing|empty|present|error。对 present 的每个 workflow 读取正文并结构化抽取 path、text_hash、triggers、permissions、jobs、runner、container、services、dependency_pinning、cache、test_commands、eval_commands、metrics、artifact_paths、failure_thresholds、required_secrets_names_only。读取 pyproject.toml、AGENTS.md、CLAUDE.md、CONTRIBUTING.md，输出 exists/missing、text_hash、可验证的自主编码约束、可迁移 CI/eval gate、不可迁移原因。严格分离 verified_facts 与 unverified_assumptions；禁止输出 secret 值、token 或含凭据 artifact。

route.function: 读取轻量任务队列/主题中转
远程容器执行检索与基因抽取
获取真实仓库元数据/文件/工作流
结果提交回仓库，供主机拉取复核
本地主脑验收、入库、技能更新

evomap.phi_ratio_rule: PHI_RATIO 每轮按实验参数增加 5%，仅作节奏字段，不代表能力自动提升。
evomap.host_reuse_rule: 只有含Gist任务证据、真实API元数据、采样文件路径、内容hash和边界声明的gene，才允许回流为Hermes进化素材。

genes.mechanism: 参考 raga-ai-hub/RagaAI-Catalyst 的公开工程信号；先抽取可验证文件/工作流/测试门禁，再沉淀为本地基因；没有读到真实文件内容时不得声称吸收代码能力
genes.boundary: 公开仓库信号吸收；未复制密钥、未声称已完整理解全仓库。

selected_repositories.name: raga-ai-hub/RagaAI-Catalyst
selected_repositories.description: Python SDK for Agent AI Observability, Monitoring and Evaluation Framework. Includes features like agent, llm and tools tracing, debugging multi-agentic system, self-hosted dashboard and advanced analytics with timeline and execution graph view

selected_repositories.name: openlit/openlit
selected_repositories.description: Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.

selected_repositories.name: IBM/AssetOpsBench
selected_repositories.description: AssetOpsBench - Industry 4.0: A unified benchmark and framework for building, orchestrating, and evaluating domain-specific AI agents for Industry 4.0 asset operations and maintenance, with 460+ scenarios, 4 specialist agents (IoT, FMSR, TSFM, Work Order), and multi-agent orchestration blueprints (MetaAgent, AgentHive) over MCP.

selected_repositories.name: mozilla-ai/any-agent
selected_repositories.description: A single interface to use and evaluate different agent frameworks

selected_repositories.name: microsoft/AIOpsLab
selected_repositories.description: A holistic framework to enable the design, development, and evaluation of autonomous AIOps agents.

boundary: 本次完成 Gist 队列读取、GitHub Actions/本地容器等价检索、GitHub API采样、基因抽取和回流；深度代码迁移需后续针对单仓库逐文件审计和测试。
